heading: Create an Atlas-managed Azure (Microsoft Azure) Service Principal
body:
Create an Azure (Microsoft Azure) Service Principal in your tenant for the
Atlas-owned Azure (Microsoft Azure) application and register it with Atlas
using the Cloud Provider Access API. Atlas returns a `roleId`
that you use when you enable EAR.

Atlas uses the following Azure (Microsoft Azure) application identity:

```sh
atlasAzureAppId: 9efedfcc-2eca-4b27-a613-0cad1e114cb7
```
